title: bassia motleyana
intro: Bassia motleyana, also known as the shrubby basia or creeping basia, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Amaranthaceae family. Traditionally, the leaves and stems of Bassia motleyana have been used in herbal medicine, with reported medicinal properties including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Bassia motleyana are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and supporting digestive health. In herbal preparations, Bassia motleyana is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also dried and used as a powder or capsule supplement.
